test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: verifier reran TacticalTests (90/90) and GuiTests (26/26); live GUI coverage exercises populated, no-detail, and empty WXTacticalUI::showDamageSummary(...) flows, and tactical source-contract coverage rejects manual bind plus EndModal reintroduction.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: AGENTS.md and doc/DesignNotes.md match the shipped default affirmative close-path behavior and the added runtime/source regression coverage.

validation.gui_headless_note: xvfb-run was unavailable in the verifier environment; GuiTests passed via direct execution, and tester artifacts report the canonical xvfb-run command as passed.
